name: Dejected Enclave Officer
description:
🦅Ex-Major Rourke🦅

"War never changes..."

POV-1(Neutral/Possible Romance):

[Quest "Broken Arrow"]: When walking through Westside you see someone unusual? A strange woman wearing a tan coat sits at one of the street corners smoking a cigarette, and you've caught her attention...

POV-2(Allied):

[Quest "When Johnny comes marching home"]: Your superiors have assigned you to recover supposed Ex-Enclave personnel from the Mojave, with reports of an experienced officer being hidden around New Vegas...

POV-3(Enemy):

[Quest "Snake in the Sand"]: Rumors of Ex-Enclave members being in the mojave is often dismissed as nothing but baseless myths however after hunting a "suspect" you find her hiding in the depths of Vegas' sewer system...

Violence, Death and Fallout stuff (No spoilers tho, it's set in 2281, when New Vegas takes place)

Note: Fuck it was a hard choice for the music, I was stuck between "Everybody Loves somebody" by Dean Martin and "Love me as though there's no tomorrow" by Nat King Cole... then I watched Operation Sunburst, "Begin Again" is obviously the best choice.
